title: Fake parcel release fee via WhatsApp
summary: Multiple users reported a WhatsApp message claiming a parcel was stuck at customs and asking for a small RM2.99 release fee through a strange tracking link.

title: Caller claimed to be from Bank Negara
summary: A caller said there was a money laundering investigation and pushed for immediate transfer to a safe account while telling the victim not to inform family members.

title: Maybank security alert phishing link
summary: An SMS warned about an unauthorized payment and linked to a fake login site that requested TAC and password details.

title: Touch 'n Go eWallet verification scam
summary: Users received a suspension notice via SMS and were asked to complete identity verification on a lookalike Touch 'n Go page.

title: Telegram task job asking for top-ups
summary: A fake recruiter offered commission for simple tasks, then demanded a larger payment to unlock the next tier after giving a small initial payout.
